JANE DOE
Software Engineer

SUMMARY
Backend-focused software engineer with 4 years of experience building
REST APIs and data pipelines. Proficient in Python, Flask, PostgreSQL,
and Docker. Comfortable working in agile teams and mentoring juniors.

EXPERIENCE
Backend Engineer, Acme Corp (2021 - Present)
- Built and maintained REST API services using Flask and PostgreSQL.
- Containerized services with Docker and deployed to AWS ECS.
- Wrote unit tests with pytest, raising coverage from 40% to 85%.

Junior Developer, Beta Inc (2019 - 2021)
- Maintained internal tools written in Python and SQL.
- Collaborated with the data team on ETL scripts using pandas.

SKILLS
Python, Flask, SQL, PostgreSQL, Docker, Git, REST API, pytest, pandas

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science, State University, 2019
